queries.question: Tell me the elements each planner uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Elements.element_name  from Urban_Planners_Elements join Elements on Urban_Planners_Elements.element_id = Elements.id join Urban_Planners on Urban_Planners_Elements.urban_planner_id = Urban_Planners.id   GROUP BY Urban_Planners_Elements.element_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Urban_Planners_Elements.urban_planner_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Urban_Planners)

queries.question: Tell me the elements each planner uses.
queries.sql: select urban_planners.name , elements.element_name from Urban_Planners_Elements join Elements on Urban_Planners_Elements.element_id = Elements.id join Urban_Planners on Urban_Planners_Elements.urban_planner_id = Urban_Planners.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?element_name WHERE {
  ?urban_planners_elements a :Urban_Planners_Elements .
  ?elements a :Elements .
  ?urban_planners_elements p:hasElements ?elements .
  ?urban_planners a :Urban_Planners .
  ?urban_planners_elements p:hasUrban_Planners ?urban_planners .
  ?urban_planners p:name ?name .
  ?elements p:element_name ?element_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me the elements each planner uses.
